title: phleum commutatum var. americanum
intro: Phleum commutatum var. americanum, also known as American timothy grass or American phleum, is a type of grass species that is native to North America, distinguished from its European counterpart, Phleum commutatum, by its wider, flat leaves and larger seedheads. The medicinal properties of American timothy grass lie in its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues and infections. The health benefits of American timothy grass include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the removal of parasites from the body. American timothy grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
